diy-hub-v1.approval_phrase: NOFI approves Component Lookup Quality Fix
stage_10_features: NEW code/backend/app/quality.py: pure-Python clean/rank/validate module (340+ LOC)
Strong token overlap check: at least 1 normalized alphanumeric query token (>=3 chars) in title (or trusted source URL bypasses)

Image validation: must be http(s), .jpg/.jpeg/.png/.webp, on approved domain (16 domains including adafruit.com, cdn-shop.adafruit.com, commons/upload.wikimedia.org, platformio.org, raw.githubusercontent.com, etc)
Score calibration: Adafruit product w/ image ~0.65+, Wikidata+image ~0.55+, PlatformIO ~0.40, GitHub-only ~0.0
Threshold: 0.50 confidence required; max 12 candidates returned
Response shape: candidates, rejected_count, quality_threshold, best_confidence
live_search.search() refactored to call rank_and_filter() after _merge()
Frontend AddComponent.tsx: model picker dialog shows 'N clean matches (best X% confidence, Y filtered out below 50%)'
Frontend empty-state dialog: 'No reliable match found' with full explanation + Enter Manually + Mock Fallback
